old: Emergency means active leak, fire alarm triggered, or burst pipe.
For emergency calls transfer to dispatch at 415-555-0101, backup 415-555-0102.
Non-emergency requests can be logged for next business day follow-up.
new: Emergency means active leak, fire alarm triggered, or burst pipe.
For emergency calls transfer to dispatch at 415-555-0101, backup 415-555-0102.
Non-emergency requests can be logged for next business day follow-up.
Emergency definition now includes fire alarm trouble plus active water flow alarm.

changes.old: Emergency means active leak, fire alarm triggered, or burst pipe.
changes.new: Emergency definition now includes fire alarm trouble plus active water flow alarm.

changes.old: Non-emergency requests can be logged for next business day follow-up.
If transfer fails after 60 seconds notify dispatch and promise a callback.
changes.new: If transfer fails, say dispatch will call back in under 15 minutes.

old: Integration note: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade from the agent.
new: Integration note: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade from the agent.
Constraint: never create sprinkler jobs in ServiceTrade.

changes.old: During office hours (Monday-Friday 08:00 AM-05:00 PM PST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
changes.new: During office hours (Monday-Friday 07:30 AM-06:00 PM PST), the agent greets the caller, collects purpose/name/number, and routes according to emergency rules.
